objective: AIRDOX custom lettering exploration, not normal fonts
rule: Main AIRDOX wordmarks are built from SVG paths and polygons.

variants.title: Berlin Stencil Break
variants.subtitle: Sharp stencil skeleton, hard cuts, useful for industrial poster motion.

variants.title: Wildline Marker Pressure
variants.subtitle: Hand-marker direction with overdraw, arrows, imperfect pressure.

variants.title: Tape Cut Industrial
variants.subtitle: Letters assembled from torn tape blocks, strong for beat-by-beat build animations.

variants.title: Chrome Bubble Skeleton
variants.subtitle: Bigger graffiti mass, chrome body, but with curated AIRDOX readability.

variants.title: Broken Neon Sign
variants.subtitle: AIRDOX as a damaged club sign: missing tubes, glow hits, readable silhouette.

variants.title: Spray Skeleton Raw
variants.subtitle: Wireframe outline, overspray field, meant for Photoshop cleanup and mask work.

variants.title: X-Lock Block Assembly
variants.subtitle: Modular letters that can assemble on beat; X gets its own final lock.

variants.title: Acid Poster Slash
variants.subtitle: Club flyer version: slash composition, aggressive negative space, less sticker-like.
